start.title: Open project
settings.uiLanguage.title: Interface Language
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.textLanguage.title: Text Language
settings.textLanguage.description: Language used in AI-generated story texts and lore items.
settings.aiEngine.title: Current AI Engine
settings.aiEngine.description: Controls the sync-status icon in the Lore Tree. Required credentials must be saved before activating an engine.
aiGenerationSettings.override: Specify custom AI generation settings for this node
engine.grok.name: Grok AI
engine.grok.notes: Maximum 10 files per request. No vector/collection search.
engine.grok.field.api_key.label: API Key
engine.grok.field.management_key.label: Management Key
engine.grok.field.management_key.hint: xAI Management API key (separate from the regular API key). Obtain at console.x.ai → Settings → Management Keys. Required for AI Billing period statistics.
engine.grok.field.team_id.label: Team ID
engine.grok.field.team_id.hint: Your xAI team ID. Visible in the xAI Console URL or team settings. Required together with the Management Key for AI Billing statistics.
engine.grok.field.max_output_tokens.hint: Max number of tokens that can be generated in a response. This includes both output and reasoning tokens.
engine.grok.field.temperature.label: Temperature
engine.grok.field.temperature.hint: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
engine.grok.field.top_p.label: Top P
engine.grok.field.top_p.hint: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered. It is generally recommended to alter this or temperature but not both.
engine.grok.field.x_search.label: X Search
engine.grok.field.web_search.label: Web Search
engine.yandex.name: Yandex Cloud AI
engine.yandex.notes: Subject to Russian Federation content regulations. No LGBTQ+ or political content.
engine.yandex.field.api_key.label: API Key
engine.yandex.field.folder_id.label: Folder ID
engine.yandex.field.folder_id.hint: Your Yandex Cloud folder ID (e.g. b1gXXXXXXXXXX). Models use URI: gpt://{folder_id}/{model}/latest
capability.fileUpload.label: File Upload
capability.fileUpload.description: Upload documents (PDF, TXT, etc.) to persistent AI storage. Uploaded files can be reused across multiple requests without re-uploading.
capability.fileDeletion.label: File Deletion
capability.fileDeletion.description: Delete previously uploaded files via the provider API to free storage and avoid orphaned billable resources.
capability.fileAttachment.label: File Attachment
capability.fileAttachment.description: Reference an uploaded file in a specific request so the model can read its contents directly.
capability.knowledgeBase.label: Knowledge Base
capability.knowledgeBase.description: Build a searchable vector or hybrid index from uploaded files (RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Also called: Vector Store, SearchIndex, Collection.
capability.knowledgeBaseAttachment.label: Knowledge Base Attachment
capability.knowledgeBaseAttachment.descr: Attach a pre-built Knowledge Base (vector store / search index) to a generation request so the model automatically retrieves relevant context from it. Also called: Search Index Tool (Yandex), Collections Search Tool (xAI Grok), file_search (OpenAI).
settings.autoSummary.title: Auto-summary generation
settings.autoSummary.description: Automatically generate a short summary (5–10 words) for plan nodes when content changes.
settings.debug.verboseAiLoggingDescripti: Prints full request headers (API key masked) and body to the server console for every AI API call. Use when diagnosing AI integration issues.
settings.models.title: Available Models
settings.generateSummaryInstructions.des: The prompt used to generate summaries. If empty, summary generation will be disabled. The instructions will be prepended to the analyzed text.
settings.generateSummaryInstructions.pla: E.g., “Briefly describe the content of the text (8 to 12 words):”
mergeNode.title: Merge Node Settings
plan.overwrite_warning: Your manual changes will be overwritten. Regenerate?
plan.forEach.title: For‑Each Node
plan.forEach.description: Processes an array of texts in a loop. Contains internal input and output nodes.
plan.forEach.rawContentPlaceholder: Enter a JSON array of strings, e.g., ["text1", "text2"]
plan.forEach.rawContentDescription: The array that will be processed in the loop. Each element becomes an iteration.
planGraph.saveToFile.emptyContent: Node content is empty, nothing to save
planGraph.deleteConfirmation: Delete this node and all connected edges?
lore.overwrite_warning: Your manual changes will be overwritten. Regenerate?
billing.configure_hint: Configure Management Key and Team ID in Grok settings to view period statistics.
regeneration.title: Content Generation
regeneration.stop_confirmation: Are you sure you want to stop the ongoing generation? This may leave some nodes in an inconsistent state.
regenerateOptions.regenerateManual.label: Regenerate manual changes
regenerateOptions.regenerateManual.descr: Whether to regenerate nodes that have been manually modified after generation, including AI-driven improvements.
